body:
🧹 Nitpick comments (1)
src/backend/claude.ts (1)
`51-55`: _⚡ Quick win_ **Use the settings body as the single source of truth for the permission mode.** This fix depends on the file contents and spawned argv never drifting. Reusing the value already pinned in `CLAUDE_WORKER_SETTINGS_BODY` makes that coupling explicit.
♻️ Proposed change ```diff - return ['--settings', settingsPath, '--setting-sources', 'user', '--permission-mode', 'bypassPermissions']; + return [ + '--settings', + settingsPath, + '--setting-sources', + 'user', + '--permission-mode', + CLAUDE_WORKER_SETTINGS_BODY.permissions.defaultMode, + ]; ```
Also applies to: 83-83
---
ℹ️ Review info
⚙️ Run configuration **Configuration used**: Organization UI **Review profile**: CHILL **Plan**: Pro **Run ID**: `17f83ba9-4495-48b7-aa5b-71be4c4eadcd`
📥 Commits Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between fc348df0d9f3d0bec8a23840ee4a6f4ef0cad89d and 132a3e31d2099b8f632f4246e8f23e784f2411a5.
📒 Files selected for processing (4) * `plans/47-claude-workers-lose-bypass-permissions-under-generated-settings/plan.md` * `plans/47-claude-workers-lose-bypass-permissions-under-generated-settings/plans/47-claude-worker-bypass-permissions.md` * `src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts` * `src/backend/claude.ts`

{src/**/*.ts,scripts/**/*.mjs} **📄 CodeRabbit inference engine (.cursor/rules/node-typescript.mdc)** > Keep runtime code compatible with Node.js 22 and newer. Files: - `src/backend/claude.ts` - `src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts`
{package.json,src/**/*.ts,scripts/**/*.mjs} **📄 CodeRabbit inference engine (.cursor/rules/node-typescript.mdc)** > Prefer Node built-ins and existing dependencies over adding new dependencies. Files: - `src/backend/claude.ts` - `src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts`
**/*.{ts,tsx} **📄 CodeRabbit inference engine (AGENTS.md)** > Prefer the repository's existing plain TypeScript style and Node built-ins Files: - `src/backend/claude.ts` - `src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts`
**/*.test.{ts,tsx,js} **📄 CodeRabbit inference engine (AGENTS.md)** > Add or update focused tests for daemon lifecycle, run-store persistence, backend invocation, MCP contracts, and release behavior when those areas change Files: - `src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts`
🧠 Learnings (1)
📚 Learning: 2026-05-06T08:38:22.917Z ```` Learnt from: ralphkrauss Repo: ralphkrauss/agent-orchestrator PR: 38 File: plans/31-codex-worker-bash-sandbox-blocks-outbound-http-eg-apigithubcom-breaking-gh-api-in-workflows/resolution-map.md:58-58 Timestamp: 2026-05-06T08:38:22.917Z Learning: In Markdown files, do not flag MD038 (spaces inside code span elements) when a code span's content starts or ends with a backtick and a leading/trailing space inside the span is required to distinguish the delimiter from the content backtick. These spaces are intentional for correct rendering under CommonMark (e.g., spans containing a fence like ``` or a language specifier like ```ts). Suppress MD038 for such lines in reviews or add a repository-wide exception in markdownlint. Pattern applies to all Markdown files in the repo (**/*.md). ```` **Applied to files:** - `plans/47-claude-workers-lose-bypass-permissions-under-generated-settings/plan.md` - `plans/47-claude-workers-lose-bypass-permissions-under-generated-settings/plans/47-claude-worker-bypass-permissions.md`

Context: ...jected: still prompts on Bash, does not fix the issue). `dontAsk` with explicit all... (FIX_RESOLVE)
🔇 Additional comments (1)
src/__tests__/claudeWorkerIsolation.test.ts (1)
`14-53`: **Nice regression coverage on the contract change.** These assertions now pin the two important surfaces for issue `#47`: the on-disk settings shape and the spawned argv, while still guarding the legacy no-`runId` behavior. As per coding guidelines, `Add or update focused tests for daemon lifecycle, run-store persistence, backend invocation, MCP contracts, and release behavior when those areas change`. Also applies to: 59-97, 103-112, 165-172
